adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: nvidia-build-emb-1

model.title: Model
model.description: The embedding model name as listed on build.nvidia.com. Examples: nvidia/nv-embedqa-e5-v5, nvidia/llama-3.2-nv-embedqa-1b-v2

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your NVIDIA API key from build.nvidia.com.

embed_batch_size.title: Embed Batch Size
embed_batch_size.description: Number of texts to embed in each batch.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.
